user_message:
You are reviewing an implementation plan for GitHub issue #39 in the EntireContext project at /Users/teslamint/workspace/entirecontext. This is a plan critique only — do NOT make any code changes. <task> Critique the implementation plan for issue #39 fix(decisions): harden staleness and contradiction handling in retrieval. Inspect the actual source files to ground your critique, then answer each of the 8 specific questions with P0/P1/P2/P3 severity ratings. Read the relevant files before answering. Key files to inspect: - src/entirecontext/core/decisions.py (focus: rank_related_decisions lines 780-970, fts_search_decisions 1017-1044, hybrid_search_decisions 1047-1072, supersede_decision 473-491, record_decision_outcome 273-331, list_decisions 174-205) - src/entirecontext/db/schema.py (lines 206-289) - src/entirecontext/mcp/tools/decisions.py - src/entirecontext/hooks/decision_hooks.py (lines 91-175) - tests/test_decisions_core.py (lines 328, 758) Current state summary (use as starting point, verify against actual code): - decisions table: staleness_status TEXT DEFAULT fresh, superseded_by_id TEXT FK - _STALENESS_FACTORS: fresh=1.0, stale=0.85, superseded=0.5, contradicted=0.25 — only used in rank_related_decisions() - rank_related_decisions(): applies base_score * staleness_factor + quality_score; fallback padding at lines 833-838 adds 20 recent decisions regardless of status - fts_search_decisions() and hybrid_search_decisions(): zero staleness filtering - supersede_decision(): blocks self-supersession but not longer cycles (A->B then B->A) - record_decision_outcome(): records but doesnt auto-update staleness
</task>

<structured_output_contract>
Answer each question (1-8) in order. For each:
- Label: P0 (blocker), P1 (must fix before ship), P2 (important improvement), P3 (consider)
- State your verdict in one sentence
- Cite the specific file:line evidence that grounds your verdict
- Give concrete recommendation (2-4 sentences max)

After all 8, add a section MISSED PATHS listing any retrieval paths not covered by the plan that you found by inspecting the code.

Total length: stay under 800 words.
</structured_output_contract>

<grounding_rules>
- Read the actual source files before answering
- Cite file:line for every claim
- If you cannot find the cited line, say so explicitly — do not guess
- Label as hypothesis anything you cannot ground in the code
</grounding_rules>

<default_follow_through_policy>
Read files first, then answer all 8 questions. Do not ask clarifying questions. Do not make any file edits.
</default_follow_through_policy>
assistant_summary: 요청한 범위는 계획 비평만으로 이해했습니다. 먼저 실제 소스와 테스트, 그리고 관련 결정/교훈 메모리까지 확인해서 현재 동작과 누락 경로를 고정한 뒤, 근거 라인과 함께 8개 항목을 P등급으로 정리하겠습니다.
